rationale.R1.1: Identifies a conceptual issue (lock-free vs mutex) but doesn't fully propose a reframing.
rationale.R1.2: Fails to engage the argument chain; focuses on factual errors rather than logical consistency.
rationale.R1.4: Asserts novelty without specific contrast, merely stating it's better than other designs.
rationale.R1.6: Improves clarity and flow in some areas but lacks a comprehensive copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty about the system's actual nature (lock-free vs mutex).
rationale.RX.3: Mostly stays within scope, focusing on the provided text.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; focuses on pointing out potential issues.
